meaning: n.北国(一国的北部地区),北部地方,北部地带
examples: Comparing with the autumn in the northland, it is just like yellow wine with colorless liquor, rice gruel with steamed bun, and perch with big crab .
Northland scenery, ice thousands of miles, miles.
I have not come upon the autumn in northland approximately more than ten years.
Northland recruits from a database of adults with kids compiled over the last ten years.
Nothing to eat since morning, except for a dry cheese sandwich on the Ontario Northland.
